config.label: Revenue
config.query: What is total revenue year to date?

config.label: Gross Margin
config.query: What is gross margin percentage year to date?
config.clickQuery: What factors are affecting gross margin?
config.trendQuery: Show monthly gross margin for the last 12 months

config.label: Burn Rate
config.query: What is the current monthly burn rate?
config.clickQuery: What are the largest contributors to burn rate?
config.trendQuery: Show monthly burn rate for the last 12 months

config.label: Cash Runway
config.query: How many months of runway do we have at current burn rate?
config.clickQuery: What scenarios affect our runway projection?
config.trendQuery: Show runway projection over the last 6 months

config.title: Revenue Bridge
config.query: Show revenue waterfall from last year to this year by category

config.title: AI Financial Insights
config.query: What are the top 5 financial insights and anomalies this period?

config.title: Top 10 Customers by Revenue
config.query: Show top 10 customers by revenue year to date

config.title: Expense Breakdown
config.query: Show expense breakdown by category year to date

config.query: Show AR aging buckets with current outstanding amounts
